fact.fact: The IPP Office is located at Bylsbridge Office Park, Building 9 Cnr Olievenhoutbosch Str. & Jean Ave, Centurion, Pretoria, South Africa.

synthesis.content: The IPP Office is a programme of the Department of Electricity and Energy in South Africa, located at Bylsbridge Office Park, Building 9 Cnr Olievenhoutbosch Str. & Jean Ave, Centurion, Pretoria, and can be contacted at Tel: +27 87 351 3000 and Email: info@ipp-projects.com.

sentences: The IPP Office is a programme of the Department of Electricity and Energy in South Africa, located at Bylsbridge Office Park, Building 9 Cnr Olievenhoutbosch Str. & Jean Ave, Centurion, Pretoria, and can be contacted at Tel: +27 87 351 3000 and Email: info@ipp-projects.com.

The IPP Office is a programme of the Department of Electricity and Energy in South Africa, located at Bylsbridge Office Park, Building 9 Cnr Olievenhoutbosch Str. & Jean Ave, Centurion, Pretoria. The office can be contacted at Tel: +27 87 351 3000 and Email: info@ipp-projects.com.
